title: The Age of The Sovereignpreneur Has Begun
summary: Jordan Urbs argues that the "sovereignpreneur" represents a new economic archetype combining solopreneur independence with sovereign individual principles. He contends that Bitcoin provides money sovereignty while AI provides labor leverage, enabling individuals to build and scale independently without relying on external platforms.
